message:
feat(pwd,grp): add BSD libutil pwcache helpers (bd-l5e6d)

Adds the BSD libutil "lookup or report" pwcache interface used by
find(1), ls(1), du(1), and other tools for fast username<->uid and
groupname<->gid resolution:

* pwd_abi::uid_from_user(name, uid) — wraps getpwnam, writes uid
  through *uid, returns 0/-1.
* pwd_abi::user_from_uid(uid, nouser) — wraps getpwuid; on miss with
  nouser=0 returns NULL, with nouser=1 formats uid as decimal ASCII
  into a process-static buffer (Mutex-protected for thread safety)
  and returns its pointer.
* grp_abi::gid_from_group(name, gid) — same pattern over getgrnam.
* grp_abi::group_from_gid(gid, nogroup) — same pattern over getgrgid.

All four are thin shims; no new core module needed since the byte-
level work (pwd/grp parsing) already lives in
frankenlibc_core::{pwd,grp}.

16 abi integration tests on temp /etc/passwd and /etc/group fixtures:
known-name resolves, unknown returns -1 / NULL, NULL pointer guards,
NULL output skips write, nouser/nogroup decimal-ASCII fallback (incl.
uid/gid 0). Clippy-clean, fmt-clean. All builds via rch.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
